_description: Encyclopædia Britannica 11th edition (1911), public domain, transcribed on Wikisource. Manifest format: each entry is {doc_id, title, article, mirror_urls[], sha256, license, source, oldid}. Populated by scripts/bootstrap_corpora.py.
_license_note: All entries are public-domain (1911 publication, US copyright expired). Mirror URLs point at en.wikisource.org transcriptions, pinned to specific oldids.
